# Voxen

> Voxen is a done-for-you LinkedIn ghostwriting service built specifically for Australian professionals. We write three LinkedIn posts per week in your voice and deliver them straight to your inbox every Monday, Wednesday and Friday between 7am and 10am AEST. You copy and paste. That is all.

## What Voxen Does

Voxen handles LinkedIn content creation entirely on behalf of busy Australian professionals. After a short onboarding questionnaire, every post is written to match your industry, your personality, your communication style and the topics you care about. Posts are crafted to sound exactly like you wrote them yourself.

There is no app to learn. No scheduling tool. No back and forth. Three posts arrive in your inbox each week and you decide whether to post them. Most clients copy and paste in under 30 seconds.

## The Problem Voxen Solves

Most Australian business owners, real estate agents, mortgage brokers, tradies and financial advisers know they should be posting on LinkedIn. They understand it builds trust, generates referrals and keeps them visible to their network. But they never actually do it consistently because writing content takes time, energy and focus they do not have after a full day of running their business.

Voxen exists to close that gap. Consistent LinkedIn presence without the time investment.

## Who Voxen Is Built For

Voxen is designed for Australian professionals across a wide range of industries including:

- Business owners and founders who want to stay visible to clients, partners and referral networks
- Real estate agents who want to build local trust and attract vendors before they even pick up the phone
- Mortgage brokers who want to demonstrate expertise to people making the biggest financial decision of their lives
- Financial advisers who want to build credibility and attract clients who already trust them before the first meeting
- Tradies and trade business owners who want to stand out in a crowded local market and generate word of mouth referrals
- Coaches and consultants who want to grow their audience and convert followers into paying clients
- Any Australian professional with a LinkedIn profile and not enough time to post on it consistently

## How It Works

Step 1: Sign up at voxen.co and complete a short onboarding questionnaire. This covers your role, industry, the topics you care about, your communication style, your goals on LinkedIn and the kind of professional reputation you want to build. Takes about five minutes.

Step 2: Voxen uses your answers to write three LinkedIn posts per week tailored specifically to you. Every post is written in first person, in your voice, covering your industry and your stories. Posts are formatted correctly for LinkedIn with proper hooks, line breaks, varied sentence length and a call to action.

Step 3: Every Monday, Wednesday and Friday between 7am and 10am AEST, a ready-to-post LinkedIn post lands in your inbox. You open the email, copy the post, paste it into LinkedIn and hit publish. Takes about 30 seconds. Your LinkedIn stays active every week without you having to think about it.

## Pricing and Plans

Voxen offers one simple plan with no lock-in contract.

- Price: $250 AUD per month including GST
- Includes: 3 LinkedIn posts per week, written in your voice, delivered to your inbox
- Delivery: Every Monday, Wednesday and Friday between 7am and 10am AEST
- Contract: None. Cancel anytime from your account with no fees or penalties
- Setup: Takes approximately two minutes to sign up and five minutes to complete the onboarding questionnaire

There are no tiers, no upsells and no hidden fees. Everything is included in the one monthly subscription.

## Why LinkedIn Matters for Australian Professionals

LinkedIn is the highest return social platform for professional services in Australia. A consistent LinkedIn presence builds trust with existing clients, keeps you top of mind with referral partners, attracts inbound enquiries from people who have been watching your content, and establishes authority in your industry before a prospect ever contacts you.

The problem is that most professionals post sporadically or not at all. One post every few months does almost nothing. Three posts per week compounds over time and builds a genuine professional brand.

## What Makes Voxen Different

- Done entirely for you. No tools to learn, no drafts to review, no writing required.
- Written in your voice based on your actual onboarding answers, not generic templates.
- Built specifically for Australian professionals, with Australian spelling, expressions and context.
- Focused exclusively on LinkedIn. Every post is written for the LinkedIn format, length and audience.
- Simple flat pricing with no lock-in. Start and stop whenever you want.
- Delivered on a consistent schedule every week without you having to request it.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is LinkedIn ghostwriting ethical?**
Yes. Ghostwriting has been standard practice across business, politics, media and publishing for centuries. CEOs use speechwriters. Authors use co-writers. Having someone write content in your voice based on your real experiences and expertise is no different. The ideas are yours. The stories are yours. Voxen just handles the writing.

**Will my followers know the posts are ghostwritten?**
Almost certainly not. Posts are written based on your onboarding answers, your industry, your personality and your stories. They are designed to sound exactly like you. Ghostwriting is also far more common than most people realise, particularly among business owners and executives on LinkedIn.

**How much does LinkedIn ghostwriting cost in Australia?**
Voxen is $250 per month for three posts per week. Freelance LinkedIn ghostwriters in Australia typically charge $150 to $500 per post. Voxen works out to approximately $20 per post, making it significantly more cost-effective for anyone who wants consistent content.

**What platforms does Voxen write for?**
Voxen writes exclusively for LinkedIn. Every post is crafted specifically for the LinkedIn format, length and tone. Voxen does not currently offer content for Instagram, Twitter, Facebook or other platforms.

**How do you write in my voice?**
When you sign up you complete a short questionnaire covering your role, industry, topics you care about, communication style and professional goals. Voxen uses your answers to shape every post so it reflects how you actually think and speak.

**Can I cancel anytime?**
Yes. There is no lock-in contract. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account with no fees or penalties.

New posts are published daily.
